children.heading: Termination of USMCA country status
children.label: a Termination of USMCA country status
children.text: During any period in which a country ceases to be a USMCA country, this Act (other than this subsection and title IX) and the amendments made by this Act shall cease to have effect with respect to that country.

children.heading: Termination of USMCA
children.label: b Termination of USMCA
children.text: On the date on which the USMCA ceases to be in force with respect to the United States, this Act and the amendments made by this Act (other than this subsection and title IX) shall cease to have effect.
